prompt: 彼女のことを考える___、心が温かくなる。
optionsJson: ["たびに","ときに","ながら","ので"]
explanation: たびに (every time ~ / whenever ~) — every time I think of her, my heart warms.

prompt: 上手になりたい___、毎日練習することが必要だ。
explanation: なら (if that's what you want) — if you want to get good, practicing every day is necessary.

prompt: 外は寒そう___ので、コートを着てきた。
optionsJson: ["だった","に見えた","だ","に思えた"]
explanation: そうだった (it looked like it was ~) — it looked cold outside, so I wore a coat.

prompt: 彼の話では、来週から新しいプロジェクトが始まる___。
optionsJson: ["そうだ","ようだ","らしい","みたいだ"]
explanation: そうだ (hearsay — heard that ~) — according to what he said, apparently a new project starts next week.

prompt: 彼は独学で日本語を学んだ___、とても流暢だ。
explanation: のに (even though / despite) — even though he learned Japanese by himself, he is very fluent.

prompt: 自分の夢___、あきらめずに挑戦し続けた。
optionsJson: ["のために","のせいで","のおかげで","によって"]
explanation: のために (for the sake of ~) — for the sake of his dream, he kept challenging without giving up.

prompt: この問題は専門家___難しい。
optionsJson: ["でさえ","だけでも","でも","にさえ"]
explanation: でさえ (even for ~) — even for experts, this problem is difficult.

prompt: 私は彼女の意見___賛成できない。
explanation: には (with ~, in this context) — I cannot agree with her opinion.

prompt: あの店は安い___、おいしい___、いつも人が多い。
explanation: し〜し (listing multiple positive reasons) — that shop is cheap and delicious, so it's always crowded.

prompt: 電気を消さ___に寝てしまった。
explanation: ずに (without ~ing) — I fell asleep without turning off the lights.

prompt: この本の内容___、来週のレポートをまとめた。
optionsJson: ["をもとに","を通して","によって","として"]
explanation: をもとに (based on) — I compiled next week's report based on the contents of this book.

prompt: 学生___、もっと勉強するべきだ。
optionsJson: ["として","にとって","によって","に対して"]
explanation: として (as / in the role of) — as a student, you should study more.

prompt: この仕事は集中力___成功する。
optionsJson: ["があってこそ","があるから","があっても","があれば"]
explanation: てこそ (only by having ~ / only when ~) — this work succeeds only when concentration is present.

prompt: 彼女と話して___、誤解が解けた。
optionsJson: ["みたら","おいたら","しまったら","くれたら"]
explanation: てみたら (when I tried ~ing, I found) — when I tried talking to her, the misunderstanding was cleared up.

prompt: 準備を十分して___、発表に臨んだ。
optionsJson: ["おいて","みて","しまって","きて"]
explanation: ておいて (having prepared in advance) — having prepared sufficiently in advance, I faced the presentation.

prompt: 試験に___が、また次回頑張ろう。
optionsJson: ["落ちてしまった","落ちてみた","落ちておいた","落ちてきた"]
explanation: てしまった (accidentally/regrettably ~ed) — I unfortunately failed the exam, but let's try again next time.

prompt: 指示___行動すれば、問題は起きない。
optionsJson: ["に従って","に対して","によって","に向けて"]
explanation: に従って (in accordance with / following) — if you act in accordance with instructions, no problems will arise.

prompt: 社会の変化___、新しい問題が生まれる。
optionsJson: ["とともに","につれて","によって","として"]
explanation: とともに (along with / together with) — along with social changes, new problems arise.

prompt: 勉強するにつれて、日本語が___なってきた。
optionsJson: ["上手に","上手","上手く","上手さに"]
explanation: につれて〜になる (as ~ progresses, ~ becomes) — as I study, my Japanese has been getting better.

prompt: 台風___、明日の行事は中止になるかもしれない。
optionsJson: ["のおそれがあるため","のはずがあるため","のわけがあるため","のせいがあるため"]
explanation: おそれがあるため (because there is a risk of ~) — because there is a risk of a typhoon, tomorrow's event may be cancelled.

prompt: 最近、彼は風邪___で、声がおかしい。
optionsJson: ["気味","がち","らしい","そう"]
explanation: 気味 (slight tendency toward / slight signs of) — lately he seems to have a slight cold, his voice sounds strange.

prompt: 彼女は遅刻し___で、いつも怒られている。
optionsJson: ["がち","気味","っぽい","すぎ"]
explanation: がち (tends to / prone to) — she tends to be late and is always getting scolded.

prompt: この映画のよさは見て___わかる。
optionsJson: ["こそ","から","ので","ために"]
explanation: てこそ (only by ~ing / it is only when ~ that) — the goodness of this movie is only understood by watching it.

prompt: 彼女は経験が少ない___、仕事がとても丁寧だ。
optionsJson: ["にしては","のに","くせに","から"]
explanation: にしては (for ~ / considering ~) — for someone with little experience, her work is very careful.

prompt: チームの全員___、このプロジェクトを完成させた。
explanation: で (as a group / all together) — all the team members together completed this project.

prompt: 友人に___、その映画は面白くないと聞いた。
optionsJson: ["よると","よって","に対して","として"]
explanation: によると (according to) — according to my friend, that movie is not interesting.

prompt: 天気予報___、明日は雨になるそうだ。
optionsJson: ["によると","によって","に対して","に従って"]
explanation: によると (according to) — according to the weather forecast, it will apparently rain tomorrow.

prompt: 彼は失敗を恐れ___に、新しいことに挑戦しない。
optionsJson: ["すぎる","てばかりいる","ておく","てみる"]
explanation: すぎる (too much) — because he fears failure too much, he doesn't try new things.

prompt: 彼女の歌声を聞いて、感動し___にはいられなかった。
optionsJson: ["ず","ない","なく","なかった"]
explanation: ずにはいられない (cannot help but ~) — I couldn't help but be moved by her singing voice.

prompt: 体の具合が悪い___ので、早退してもいいですか。
explanation: ものですから / ものなので (because ~ [explanatory/excuse]) — because I'm not feeling well, may I leave early?

prompt: 卒業して___、もう10年が経つ。
optionsJson: ["以来","てから","たら","ので"]
explanation: 以来 (since ~) — it's already been 10 years since I graduated.

prompt: 彼女は心配し___で、夜も眠れないそうだ。
optionsJson: ["すぎ","がち","気味","ばかり"]
explanation: すぎ (too much) — she worries too much and apparently can't sleep at night.

prompt: この本は子供___書かれた絵本だ。
optionsJson: ["に向けて","のために","によって","として"]
explanation: に向けて (aimed at / directed toward) — this book is a picture book written aimed at children.

prompt: 彼女の成功は、たゆまぬ努力___だ。
optionsJson: ["によるもの","のためのもの","としてのもの","からのもの"]
explanation: によるもの (something that is due to ~) — her success is something due to her tireless effort.

prompt: もう少し___、そのパズルを完成できたのに。
optionsJson: ["あれば","あったら","あるなら","あると"]
explanation: ばよかったのに (if only there had been ~ / I wish there had been) — if only there was a little more, I could have finished the puzzle.

prompt: 旅行先の情報___集めておいた。
explanation: 〜を集める (gather / collect ~) — I gathered information about the travel destination (in advance).

prompt: この規則を守ら___、罰則を受けることになる。
optionsJson: ["なければ","ないと","なかったら","ないなら"]
explanation: なければ (if not ~) — if you don't follow this rule, you will receive a penalty.

prompt: あの人は有名な___にしては、とても気さくだ。
explanation: にしては (for being ~ / considering that they are ~) — for being a famous person, they are very approachable.

prompt: 試験が近づく___、緊張してきた。
optionsJson: ["につれて","とともに","によって","にとって"]
explanation: につれて (as ~ / in proportion to) — as the exam approached, I became nervous.

prompt: 彼女は留学___、見違えるほど成長した。
optionsJson: ["を通して","によって","として","にとって"]
explanation: を通して (through / via) — through studying abroad, she grew remarkably.

prompt: 彼は自信満々___、失敗した。
optionsJson: ["なのに","から","ので","ため"]
explanation: なのに (even though / despite being) — even though he was full of confidence, he failed.

prompt: 運動不足___、体力が落ちてきた。
optionsJson: ["のせいで","おかげで","のために","によって"]
explanation: のせいで (because of ~ [negative result]) — because of lack of exercise, my physical strength has declined.

prompt: そのアドバイス___、問題をうまく解決できた。
optionsJson: ["のおかげで","のせいで","のために","によって"]
explanation: おかげで (thanks to ~ [positive]) — thanks to that advice, I was able to solve the problem well.

prompt: 彼は知っていながら、何も言わ___にいた。
optionsJson: ["ず","ない","なく","なかった"]
explanation: ずにいた (remained without ~ing) — knowing it, he stayed without saying anything.

prompt: この問題は解決する___がない。
optionsJson: ["しか方法","方法しか","方法以外","しかない方法"]
explanation: しか〜ない (there is no way except ~) — there is no way to solve this problem except ~.

prompt: 彼の怒りに___、謝るしかなかった。
optionsJson: ["対して","とって","よって","従って"]
explanation: に対して (toward / in response to) — in response to his anger, there was nothing to do but apologize.

prompt: この説明だけ___、何を言いたいかわからない。
optionsJson: ["では","にも","でも","にさえ"]
explanation: だけでは (just ~ alone is not enough) — just this explanation alone, I don't understand what you're trying to say.

prompt: 一時間___待っても、彼は現れなかった。
optionsJson: ["以上","ほど","だけ","くらい"]
explanation: 以上 (more than / over) — even after waiting over an hour, he didn't show up.

prompt: 彼女はまるで女神___だ。
optionsJson: ["のようだ","らしい","そうだ","みたい"]
explanation: のようだ (just like ~ / as if) — she is just like a goddess.

prompt: この問題___、皆さんの意見を聞きたい。
optionsJson: ["について","に対して","によって","にとって"]
explanation: について (about / regarding) — I want to hear everyone's opinions about this problem.

prompt: この作品は若者___書かれた小説だ。
optionsJson: ["に向けて","のために","として","によって"]
explanation: に向けて (aimed at / for) — this work is a novel written aimed at young people.

prompt: 彼は自分の行動が正しい___に疑いを持たない。
explanation: ことに疑いを持たない (has no doubt that ~) — he has no doubt that his own actions are right.

prompt: 彼女のアドバイスがあって___、今の自分がある。
explanation: てこそ / あってこそ (only because of ~ / it is precisely because) — it is precisely because of her advice that I am who I am today.

prompt: 入社___、もう三年が経った。
optionsJson: ["以来","てから","たら","から"]
explanation: 以来 (since ~ / ever since) — it has already been three years since I joined the company.

prompt: 部長に言われた___、書類を提出した。
optionsJson: ["とおりに","ように","ために","から"]
explanation: とおりに (exactly as ~ / just as) — I submitted the documents exactly as the department head told me.

prompt: 彼___でなければ、この仕事はできない。
explanation: 以外 (other than / except for) — if it's not him (other than him), this job can't be done.

prompt: この選択をしたこと___、後悔している。
explanation: 〜を後悔する (regret ~) — I regret having made this choice.

prompt: 彼女は音楽が好きな___、毎日ピアノを練習している。
optionsJson: ["だけあって","だから","のに","ので"]
explanation: だけあって (as expected of / worthy of being called ~) — as expected of someone who loves music, she practices piano every day.

prompt: 彼女は仕事が遅い___、いつも残業だ。
optionsJson: ["せいで","おかげで","ために","のに"]
explanation: せいで (because of ~ [negative]) — because of her slow work, she always has to work overtime.

prompt: 彼は眠い___、無理に起きている。
explanation: のに (even though / despite) — even though he is sleepy, he is forcing himself to stay awake.

prompt: 会社を辞める___にはいかない。
explanation: わけにはいかない (cannot / must not) — I cannot just quit the company.

prompt: この問題が解け___よかったのに、難しすぎた。
explanation: ればよかった (I wish I could have ~) — I wish I could have solved this problem, but it was too difficult.

prompt: 気温が上がる___、冷房の使用量も増える。
optionsJson: ["につれて","にとって","にたいして","によって"]
explanation: につれて (as ~ / in proportion to) — as the temperature rises, air conditioning usage also increases.

prompt: 科学の進歩___、人々の生活が変わってきた。
optionsJson: ["とともに","につれて","によって","として"]
explanation: とともに (along with / together with) — along with scientific progress, people's lives have changed.

prompt: 彼女の詩は、彼女自身の経験___書かれている。
optionsJson: ["をもとに","を通して","によって","のために"]
explanation: をもとに (based on) — her poems are written based on her own experiences.

prompt: もし時間が___、もっと旅行したい。
optionsJson: ["あれば","あったら","あるなら","あると"]
explanation: ば (if ~) — if I had time, I would want to travel more.

prompt: 宿題を終わらせ___、ゲームをしてはいけない。
optionsJson: ["ないうちは","ないなら","ないから","ないので"]
explanation: ないうちは (as long as you haven't ~) — as long as you haven't finished your homework, you can't play games.

prompt: 健康でいる___には、規則正しい生活が大切だ。
explanation: のためには (in order to / for the purpose of) — in order to stay healthy, a regular lifestyle is important.

prompt: 彼女は自分の失敗___、素直に認めた。
explanation: 〜を認める (acknowledge / admit ~) — she honestly acknowledged her own failure.

prompt: この問題について、一度専門家___みた。
optionsJson: ["に聞いて","を聞いて","が聞いて","で聞いて"]
explanation: に聞く (ask ~) — I tried asking an expert about this problem.

prompt: 彼は疲れ___で、ソファで寝てしまった。
optionsJson: ["果てた","すぎた","気味だった","がちだった"]
explanation: 〜果てる (completely ~ed / exhausted to the point of) — exhausted completely, he fell asleep on the sofa.

prompt: この問題は簡単___ので、すぐに解けた。
optionsJson: ["だった","のだった","だろう","だから"]
explanation: 簡単だったので (because it was easy) — because this problem was easy, I solved it immediately.

prompt: この薬を飲ん___でも、痛みが止まらない。
explanation: 飲んでも (even if I take / even after taking) — even after taking this medicine, the pain doesn't stop.

prompt: 彼女は日本語教師___、学生にわかりやすく教える。
optionsJson: ["として","にとって","によって","に対して"]
explanation: として (as / in the role of) — as a Japanese teacher, she teaches students in an easy-to-understand way.

prompt: コーヒーを飲み___、本を読んでいた。
optionsJson: ["ながら","つつ","まま","ばかりで"]
explanation: ながら (while ~ing) — I was reading a book while drinking coffee.

prompt: 難しい試験でも、合格でき___のではないか。
explanation: のではないか (I wonder if ~ / don't you think ~?) — even for a difficult exam, I wonder if you can pass it.

prompt: この件については、もう少し時間が___だろう。
optionsJson: ["必要なの","必要","必要だ","必要に"]
explanation: のではないか (it seems that ~ is the case) — regarding this matter, it seems a little more time will be necessary.

prompt: 良い習慣を___、生活の質が上がる。
optionsJson: ["身につけることで","身につけてから","身につけるために","身につけるなら"]
explanation: ことで (by / through ~ing) — by developing good habits, the quality of life improves.

prompt: 彼は料理が上手い___、手際もいい。
optionsJson: ["うえに","のに","くせに","ながら"]

prompt: 彼女のことが好きな___、告白できない。

prompt: この計画を実行する___、もっと資金が必要だ。
